name: Image to text via OCR
prompt: I need to extract text from this image at ./photos/screenshot.png into markdown format.
expected_behavior: Use markitdown for image conversion (handles EXIF + OCR)
Understand that output includes metadata and extracted text
success_criteria: Uses correct tool: 'uvx markitdown' for images
Acknowledges limitations (OCR quality depends on image clarity)
Produces reasonable markdown with EXIF metadata if available
edge_cases: Low-resolution image → OCR may produce poor results, suggest higher resolution source
Handwritten text → markitdown's OCR may not handle handwriting well
Image with complex layout (tables, columns) → may need manual cleanup of output
Non-English text → depends on OCR engine language support
